name: http_data_fetching
description: Proficiency in fetching data from REST APIs and web endpoints using HTTP GET requests
instructions_md: To fetch API data: 1) Use fetch_json for endpoints returning JSON — pass query parameters via the params dict. 2) Use fetch_html when you need raw HTML to parse manually. 3) Use download_file for binary files (PDFs, images, archives) — set overwrite=True if re-downloading. 4) Check status_code in the response — 200 means success, 4xx means client error, 5xx means server error. 5) For APIs requiring authentication, pass the Authorization header in the headers dict.
